welcome.title:
Your clipboard,
on every device
welcome.body: All your own devices sharing one clipboard — no collaboration, no cloud.

companion.title:
A companion
to your computer
companion.body: Connect to the UniClipboard desktop app that's already running, and bring your clipboard to hand.

lan.title:
Same Wi-Fi,
a direct link
lan.body: Your phone and computer talk peer-to-peer on the same local network — no detour through the internet. What you copy arrives almost instantly.

action.title: Copy here, paste there
action.body: Copy on your computer and paste on your phone; use the share sheet to send anything back.
